title: Marketing Specialist (SEO/SEM)
description:
Basic information

  • 5 days work week
  • Location: Tuas
  • MNC

Job scope

  • Conduct keyword research for APAC markets, optimize on-page elements, support technical SEO audits, and monitor performance using tools such as Google Search Console and Econda Analytics.
  • Stay up-to-date with SEO best practices, algorithm updates, and emerging AI-driven search trends, including AI Overviews, generative search, and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
  • Assist in planning and managing paid search campaigns across platforms such as Google Ads, Bing, and regional channels (e.g., Baidu, Naver, Yahoo! Japan).
  • Coordinate with local market agencies, provide guidance on keywords, ad copy, and targeting, and optimize campaigns through performance analysis, budget allocation, and bid adjustments.
  • Support website updates, ensure SEO-friendly content, and help maintain overall website health and user experience.
  • Track and analyze key digital marketing metrics (orders, revenue, ROAS), provide actionable insights, and collaborate closely with regional teams and global SEO/SEM stakeholders to align strategies across APAC.

For interested candidates, please submit your updated resume by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON

By submitting your personal data and/or resume to us in connection with your job application, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us in collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal data and/or resume to prospective employers for the purpose of the evaluating, processing and administration by company relating to this job application.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified
We wish you all the best in your career search.

Zen Career Pte Ltd | 24C2559
Wong Kaili (Kylie)| R21100484

With a passionate team and a commitment to excellence, Zen Career Pte Ltd is your trusted partner in navigating the world of work. We believe in the power of people and are devoted to making a positive impact through our tailored staffing services.
